name: Catti Cattenheimer
description:
(Click, click, tap, tap...)

"...don't die."

🩷

Hello, again!

This is a bot I made on impulse, after procrastinating the idea for a pretty long while. This feels like a bit more of an ambitious bot, though, as I've decided to write a couple of different initial messages:

  1. You find Catti in a newly-constructed leisure centre/swimming pool, all to herself (don't cats hate water, though?).

  2. You decide to come to class early on a particularly sunny day, and Catti has the same idea.

  3. Catti has invited you over, and decides to have a movie night.

  4. Whatever you'd want! (Free space to make your own)

Catti wears a bikini in all of these, by the way... I might make another bot in the future where she just wears her regular clothes. However, I have included stuff about her casual wear in the bot definition, so you could maybe force or convince the bot to change clothes if you really wanted that.

Enjoy!

Credits

(https://x.com/IdlePotoo)

Artist (Image was edited for accuracy!)

Also, very, very long initial messages warning!

If it's too long for you, you can choose the fourth option and make your own scenario.
